name: Wig Forge
description: Capture-backed asset forging, inventory, and equip tools for bot rewards.

storageDir.description: Optional absolute directory for forged asset storage.

accountId.description: Cloudflare account ID for the target R2 endpoint.

bucket.description: R2 bucket name used for mirrored wig-forge asset files.

accessKeyId.description: R2 access key ID with object write permission.

secretAccessKey.description: R2 secret access key with object write permission.

publicBaseUrl.description: Optional public/custom-domain base URL for direct asset delivery.

keyPrefix.description: Optional object key prefix. Defaults to wig-forge.
